title: Abyssborne
description: Abyssborne adds new "the Abyss" dimension, including new biomes.
body: Welcome to the Abyss! Abyss is a new dimension, adding new 5 biomes and 2 gears to the game, Crimsonite and Amaryllium, generally better than diamond. 1 block in the Abyss equals to 8 blocks of the Nether, which also means 64 blocks of the Overworld! Portal only can be ignited in the Nether, using Smooth Quartz as frame and Lava Bucket to ignite! ![Abyssborne Title](https://i.imgur.com/cfhVJcg.png) ![Abyssborne adds new "the Abyss" dimension, including new biomes! A block in the Abyss equals to 8 blocks in the Nether. Portal only can be ignited in the Nether, using Smooth Quartz as frame and lava bucket to activate.](https://i.imgur.com/P8QOFwX.png)
